synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0936 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 glib2 security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0936

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0936.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.noarch.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.noarch.rpm
glib2-static-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/glib2-2.68.4-18.el9_7.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-13601
